zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight於1301年2月23日出生在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯時，他的父親Sir Robert de Lathom II60歲，母親Katherine Knowsley53歲。他於1328年與Eleanor de Ferrers在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1370年9月14日在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯享年69歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾布爾斯庫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight于1301年2月23日出生在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Lathom II60岁，母亲Katherine Knowsley53岁。他于1328年与Eleanor de Ferrers在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1370年9月14日在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯享年69岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾布爾斯庫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lathom,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Latham
meanings: English: habitational name from Lathom in Lancashire, or occasionally perhaps from Laytham in Yorkshire. The placenames mean ‘at the barns’, from hlǫthum, the dative plural form of Old Norse hlatha ‘barn, store house’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight was born on 23 February 1301, in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Robert de Lathom II, was 60 and his mother, Katherine Knowsley, was 53. He married Eleanor de Ferrers in 1328, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 14 September 1370, in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Burscough, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight est né le 23 février 1301, à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Lathom II, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Katherine Knowsley, avait 53 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Ferrers en 1328, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1370, à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Burscough, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight am 23. Februar 1301 in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Lathom II 60 und seine Mutter Katherine Knowsley 53. Er hat 1328 in Lancashire, England Eleanor de Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. September 1370 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England und wurde in Burscough, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight è nato il il 23 febbraio 1301 nel Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Lathom II, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Knowsley, aveva 53 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Ferrers nel 1328, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 14 settembre 1370, nel Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Burscough, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knightが1301年2月23日にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Lathom IIは60歳，母Katherine Knowsleyは53歳であった。1328年にイギリスランカシュアイアでEleanor de Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1370年9月14日にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスで69歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアブルスコウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight(이)가 1301년 2월 23일 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Lathom II(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Knowsley(은)는 53세였다. 그는 1328년 영국 랭카실르에서 Eleanor de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1370년 9월 14일 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 버스코우그h에 묻혔다.

mn.23 February 1301–14 September 1370: 1301 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 23–1370 оны Есдүгээр сарын 14

pt.23 February 1301–14 September 1370: 23 de fevereiro de 1301–14 de setembro de 1370
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight nasceu em 23 de fevereiro de 1301, em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Lathom II, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Knowsley, tinha 53 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Ferrers em 1328, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1370, em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Burscough, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight родился 23 февраля 1301 г. в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Lathom II было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Knowsley, 53. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Ferrers в 1328 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 сентября 1370 г. в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности бурскоую, ланкашир, Англия.

sm.BET 1344 AND 1347: mai le 1344 e o'o I le 1347

es.23 February 1301–14 September 1370: 23 de febrero de 1301–14 de septiembre de 1370
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight nació el 23 de febrero de 1301, en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert de Lathom II, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Katherine Knowsley, tenía 53 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Ferrers en 1328, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1370, en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Burscough, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
